creator: freebsd@zilon.de
text:
Regarding to /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk lau52 is the default version. 

I ran into this issue because some of the required ports were upgraded to Lua 5.2 but not all and Prosody did not want to start anymore because somethind was missing. Now I downgraded all Lua ports to 5.1 and reinstalled Prosody and everything is fine.

On the other side, woull the Prosody port work with Lua 5.2 if the dependency in the makefile is changed?
